                // State s=1: i IS chosen (Requires j >= 1)
                if (j >= 1) {
                    // Must transition from i-1 (m-1) NOT chosen
                    DP[m][j][1] = DP[m-1][j-1][0] + C[i];
                }
            }
        }
        
        return Math.min(DP[M][k_target][0], DP[M][k_target][1]);
    }

    let min_cost = INF;

    // Case 1: Index 0 is NOT a peak. Solve on path [1, N-1].
    const cost1 = pathDP(1, N - 1, k);
    min_cost = Math.min(min_cost, cost1);

    // Case 2: Index 0 IS a peak. Solve on path [2, N-2] for k-1 peaks.
    if (k >= 1) {

        const start2 = 2;
        const end2 = N - 2;

        }
    }

}

function solve(nums, k) {

    const INF = Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;

    if (k > Math.floor(N / 2)) return -1;

    const C = new Array(N);
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {

        const R_i = nums[(i + 1) % N];
        const required_val = Math.max(L_i, R_i) + 1;
        const cost = Math.max(0, required_val - nums[i]);
        C[i] = cost;
    }

    // Helper function for Path DP
    // Calculates min cost to achieve k_target peaks in indices [start, end]
    // Returns INF if impossible.
    function pathDP(start, end, k_target) {
        if (k_target === 0) return 0;
        
        const M = end - start + 1; // Length of the path
        if (M <= 0 || k_target > Math.floor(M / 2)) return INF;

        // DP[m][j][s]
        // m: length prefix (1 to M)
        // j: number of peaks achieved (0 to k_target)
        // s: state of the last element (index start + m - 1)
        // s=0: not chosen, s=1: chosen
        
        // Initialize DP table: (M+1) x (k_target+1) x 2
        const DP = Array(M + 1).fill(0).map(() => 
            Array(k_target + 1).fill(0).map(() => [INF, INF])
        );

        // Base case: m=1 (Index start)
        const i0 = start;
        DP[1][0][0] = 0;
        DP[1][1][1] = C[i0];

        // Fill DP table
        for (let m = 2; m <= M; m++) {
            const i = start + m - 1; // Current index
            
            for (let j = 0; j <= k_target; j++) {
                
                // State s=0: i is NOT chosen
                // Transition from i-1 (m-1) being chosen or not chosen
                DP[m][j][0] = Math.min(DP[m-1][j][0], DP[m-1][j][1]);

                // State s=1: i IS chosen (Requires j >= 1)
                if (j >= 1) {
                    // Must transition from i-1 (m-1) NOT chosen
                    DP[m][j][1] = DP[m-1][j-1][0] + C[i];
                }
            }
        }
        
        return Math.min(DP[M][k_target][0], DP[M][k_target][1]);
    }

    let min_cost = INF;

    // Case 1: Index 0 is NOT a peak. Solve on path [1, N-1].
    const cost1 = pathDP(1, N - 1, k);
    min_cost = Math.min(min_cost, cost1);

    // Case 2: Index 0 IS a peak. Solve on path [2, N-2] for k-1 peaks.
    if (k >= 1) {
        let cost2_path = INF;
        const start2 = 2;
        const end2 = N - 2;

        if (start2 <= end2) {

            cost2_path = pathDP(start2, end2, k - 1);
        } else if (k - 1 === 0) {

            cost2_path = 0;
        } else {

        }
    }

}

```javascript
/**
 * @param {number[]} nums
 * @param {number} k
 * @return {number}
 */
function solve(nums, k) {
    const N = nums.length;
    const INF = Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;

    if (k === 0) return 0;
    if (k > Math.floor(N / 2)) return -1;

    // 1. Precalculate costs C_i
    const C = new Array(N);
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
        const L_i = nums[(i - 1 + N) % N];
        const R_i = nums[(i + 1) % N];
        const required_val = Math.max(L_i, R_i) + 1;
        const cost = Math.max(0, required_val - nums[i]);
        C[i] = cost;
    }

    // Helper function for Path DP
    // Calculates min cost to achieve k_target peaks in indices [start, end]
    // Returns INF if impossible.
    function pathDP(start, end, k_target) {
        if (k_target === 0) return 0;
        
        const M = end - start + 1; // Length of the path
        if (M <= 0 || k_target > Math.floor(M / 2)) return INF;

        // DP[m][j][s]
        // m: length prefix (1 to M)
        // j: number of peaks achieved (0 to k_target)
        // s: state of the last element (index start + m - 1)
        // s=0: not chosen, s=1: chosen
        
        // Initialize DP table: (M+1) x (k_target+1) x 2
        const DP = Array(M + 1).fill(0).map(() => 
            Array(k_target + 1).fill(0).map(() => [INF, INF])
        );

        // Base case: m=1 (Index start)
        const i0 = start;
        DP[1][0][0] = 0;
        DP[1][1][1] = C[i0];

        // Fill DP table
        for (let m = 2; m <= M; m++) {
            const i = start + m - 1; // Current index
            
            for (let j = 0; j <= k_target; j++) {
                
                // State s=0: i is NOT chosen
                // Transition from i-1 (m-1) being chosen or not chosen
                DP[m][j][0] = Math.min(DP[m-1][j][0], DP[m-1][j][1]);

                // State s=1: i IS chosen (Requires j >= 1)
                if (j >= 1) {
                    // Must transition from i-1 (m-1) NOT chosen
                    DP[m][j][1] = DP[m-1][j-1][0] + C[i];
                }
            }
        }
        
        return Math.min(DP[M][k_target][0], DP[M][k_target][1]);
    }

    let min_cost = INF;

    // Case 1: Index 0 is NOT a peak. Solve on path [1, N-1].
    const cost1 = pathDP(1, N - 1, k);
    min_cost = Math.min(min_cost, cost1);

    // Case 2: Index 0 IS a peak. Solve on path [2, N-2] for k-1 peaks.
    if (k >= 1) {
        let cost2_path = INF;
        const start2 = 2;
        const end2 = N - 2;

        if (start2 <= end2) {
            // We need k-1 peaks in the path [2, N-2]
            cost2_path = pathDP(start2, end2, k - 1);
        } else if (k - 1 === 0) {
            // If the path is empty (e.g., N=2 or N=3), and we need 0 more peaks, cost is 0.
            cost2_path = 0;
        } else {
            // If path is empty and we need > 0 peaks, cost is INF.
        }
        
        if (cost2_path !== INF) {
             const cost2 = C[0] + cost2_path;
             min_cost = Math.min(min_cost, cost2);
        }
    }
    
    return min_cost === INF ? -1 : min_cost;
}
